description: Implement the Claude Code agent backend in internal/agent/claudecode/. Invokes Claude Code as a CLI subprocess with --dangerously-skip-permissions and -p for the prompt, --output-format json. Build the prompt from ExecutionRequest, manage the subprocess lifecycle (working directory, stdout/stderr capture, context cancellation, timeout), parse JSON output. Reference docs/implementation-plan.md Milestone 5b for implementation details and the important note about checking current Claude Code CLI flags.
commit: feat(agent): add Claude Code subprocess implementation
steps: Create internal/agent/claudecode/claude.go with a struct implementing agent.Agent
Implement prompt construction: include task description, steps (with resume-from context if ResumeFrom > 0), commit message instruction, scope constraint
Implement subprocess execution: exec.CommandContext with WorkDir set to worktree path, capture stdout/stderr, handle context cancellation (kill process), respect timeout from context
Implement JSON output parsing from Claude Code's --output-format json response to populate ExecutionResult

Create internal/agent/claudecode/claude_test.go: test prompt construction for fresh start and resume scenarios, test with a mock executable (shell script echoing JSON), test context cancellation kills subprocess, test timeout handling
acceptance_criteria: Agent invokes claude CLI with --dangerously-skip-permissions -p and --output-format json
Prompt includes task description, ordered steps, commit message template, and scope instructions
Resume prompt correctly indicates which step to resume from and includes prior error/feedback
Subprocess runs in the worktree directory
JSON output is parsed into ExecutionResult
Errors include stderr output for debugging
